pra-√mud Ā. -modate, to become joyful, rejoice greatly, exult, be delighted,  AV.  &c. &c.:
Caus. -modayati, to make glad, delight,  Mn. ;  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;  Sāh.

results.rendered_html: pramud (1. pra + mud) f. Freude, Lust; Liebeslust  ṚV. 9,113,11 .  VS. 30,10 . 39,9 .  ŚAT. BR. 14,7,1,11 . śrutvā tu pārthivasyaitatsaṃvartaḥ pramudaṃ gataḥ  MBH. 14,158 . anyena matpramudaḥ kalpayasva  ṚV. 10,10,12 . adj. froh  ŚKDR.  angeblich nach  AK.

results.rendered_html:
pramud 1 A. To be extremely glad, be very much delighted;  R. 6. 86 ;  Māl. 5. 23. 
— Caus. To gladden, delight, exhilarate; pramodaya cātakān  Māl. 9. 41.
